data.title: Refactor 12 Python functions in 100-180 line range to meet 80-line soft limit
data.description: Functions: analyze_session (224), render_report (194), figma-merge::main (189), find_violations_in_ast (183), run (156), ticket-graph::main (137), add_dependency (124), write_create_events (119). Split into smaller focused functions. AC: no function >180 lines.
